case_title: TOM CUMMISKEY VS. LENA R. GILBERT

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2013 AT 3:30 PM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
